title: AXTreeItemClickBaseEvent
description: Event emitted when a tree item is clicked, selected, or interacted with.

props.name: component
props.description: The sender component instance. Inherited from AXClickEvent.

props.name: htmlElement
props.description: The root native element associated with the component. Inherited from AXClickEvent.

props.name: isUserInteraction
props.description: Indicates whether the event was triggered by user interaction. Inherited from AXClickEvent.

props.name: data
props.description: The tree item data that was clicked.

props.name: nativeElement
props.description: The native DOM element of the clicked item.

sections.title: Event Definition
sections.description: TypeScript definition of the event with inherited members expanded.
